title: leuconymphaea gigantea
intro: Leuconymphaea gigantea, also known as giant earthball, is a type of fungus that belongs to the order Boletales. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Leuconymphaea gigantea include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, infections, and even some types of cancer. Leuconymphaea gigantea can be prepared into herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use is primarily limited to traditional and folk medicine practices.
